allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:5000]\) ")
Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(list\(data.keys\(\)\)\) col = data.get\('collection', {}\) print\(list\(col.keys\(\)\)\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) col = data.get\('collection', data\) items = col.get\('item', col.get\('items', []\)\) def print_items\(items, indent=0\): if isinstance\(items, list\): for item in items: name = item.get\('name', 'unknown'\) subitems = item.get\('item', []\) if subitems: print\(' ' * indent + f'[FOLDER] {name}'\) print_items\(subitems, indent + 2\) else: method = '' req = item.get\('request', {}\) if isinstance\(req, dict\): method = req.get\('method', ''\) url = req.get\('url', ''\) if isinstance\(url, dict\): url = '/'.join\(url.get\('path', []\)\) print\(' ' * indent + f'{method} {name} -> {url}'\) print_items\(items\) ")
